description.ko: 수백만 년 동안의 지질 활동과 침식으로 형성된 거칠고 강력한 질감을 강조하며 지구 지각의 상세한 모습을 탐구합니다.
description.en: A detailed exploration of the Earth's crust, highlighting the raw and powerful textures formed by millions of years of geological activity and erosion.

prompt: Hyper-realistic satellite photography of Earth's surface, focusing on complex geological textures, deep tectonic fissures, layered sedimentary rocks, and oxidized mineral deposits, top-down perspective, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, natural earthy color palette featuring sienna, ochre, and slate.
